title: Origins: Bat-Eared Fox
description: Adding the sly, big-eared fox who roams the hot plains; talented in the arts of escaping predators.
body:
## Description
You are an adorable, big-eared fox who roams the hot plains; talented in the arts of escaping predators.

## Powers
🟢 | Positive Power

🔵 | Ability

🟡 | Neutral Power

🔴 | Negative Power

——————————

🟢 **Home Sweet Home** - You gain strength in your natural habitat, the Savanna.

🟢 **Insectivore** - As the only insectivorous canid, you deal more damage to bugs.

🟢 **Lightweight** - You are faster and produce no sound from your footsteps (as well as jumps).

🟢 **Night Vision** - Being a canine allows you to see in the dark.

🟢 **Sweet Berry Immunity** - You are immune to sweet berry bushes.

🔵 **Big Ears (primary)** - You are able to listen and locate mobs within a 45 block radius (1m cooldown).

🔵 **Pounce (secondary)** - You can jump towards any direction you are looking (15s cooldown).

——————————

🟡 **Small Size** - Being on the smaller side of foxes, you are slightly shorter than most players (1.5 Blocks Tall).

——————————

🔴 **Carnivorous** - You can't eat the bugs in Minecraft, idk what you want from me.

🔴 **Endangered** - Poachers love taking your fur. You take more damage from ranged weaponry.

🔴 **Nocturnal** - You are not supposed to be up during the day. You will have Weakness I when the sun is up.

🔴 **Small Stomach** - Due to your small size, you digest food much quicker, causing you to get hungry faster.

🔴 **Weak** - Your small size means you have 3 less hearts than the typical player.

## Want to Contact Me?
Join the Origins Discord server, head into the `#datapacks` channel, search for `Bat-Eared Fox 🦊 [1.20.2-1.21.1]`, and leave a comment. I'll try my best to respond quickly, but remember, this is a hobby project and not every suggestion will be added!
